arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are both keeping a close eye on Sporting Lisbon defender Ousmane Diomande ahead of this summer, CaughtOffside understands. The talented young Ivory Coast international has long been on the radar of several top clubs around Europe, and it’s currently Arsenal and Chelsea showing the strongest interest in him. arts.ttl: Tottenham and Chelsea lined up for €40-50m transfer tussle – Both willing to pay up
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Chelsea are in the picture to sign AFC Bournemouth’s Antoine Semenyo, according to Area Napoli. The winger has starred for the Cherries this season, managing nine goals and five assists 31 games. Last week, TuttoMercatoWeb reported Napoli are looking at Semenyo, who they thought was valued at €30m by Bournemouth. arts.ttl: Chelsea have three players fighting for futures and it starts against Copenhagen
arts.sum: With this all being said, football.london takes a look at three Chelsea players that will have a heavy reliance on the Conference League between now and the end of the season to fight for their place at the club ahead of the summer transfer window. This season, the competition has given head coach Enzo Maresca an opportunity to rotate his squad and hand the so-called fringe players some much-needed first team minutes.
